metadata.description: Local marketplace for parchment. Adds a generative-UI canvas to Claude Code: a compact set of MCP tools (canvas_render, canvas_live, canvas_app, canvas_plan, canvas_patch, canvas_snapshot, canvas_library, canvas_close) push validated json-render specs to a browser tab; edits flow back via UserPromptSubmit hook.

plugins.name: parchment
plugins.description: Generative-UI canvas for Claude Code via MCP + json-render.
